category_sources: Official Riverbank PyQt page describes PyQt as Python bindings for Qt's application framework.
source_facts.description says PyQt provides Python bindings for Qt v6.
display_name_sources: Official Riverbank PyQt page uses the display name PyQt.
docs_sources: Official Riverbank site hosts the PyQt6 Reference Guide under static/Docs/PyQt6.
source_facts.homepage is the official Riverbank PyQt page.
repo_sources: Official Riverbank PyQt page and download page identify PyQt as a Riverbank product but no official source-control project URL was confirmed.
tags_sources: Official Riverbank PyQt page says PyQt6 supports Qt6 and contains over 1,000 classes.
source_facts.description identifies Python bindings for Qt v6.
